page_metadata.biotools__summary: FastK is a k‑mer counter that is optimized for processing high quality DNA assembly data sets such as those produced with an Illumina instrument or a PacBio run in HiFi mode.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: FastK: A K-mer counter (for HQ assembly data sets)
